glosses.ja: 討論する; 議論する

sentences.target: On débat du menu pour ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ de.ba dy mə.ny puʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On débat du menu pour ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ de.ba dy mə.ny puʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We’re debating the menu for tonight.
translations.es: Estamos decidiendo el menú para esta noche.
translations.de: Wir diskutieren das Menü für heute Abend.
translations.it: Stiamo discutendo il menù per stasera.
translations.ko: 오늘 저녁 메뉴를 두고 이야기하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在讨论今晚的菜单。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度傾緊今晚食咩。
translations.pt: Estamos decidindo o cardápio para hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang bàn về thực đơn cho tối nay.
translations.ar: نحن نناقش قائمة الطعام لهذه الليلة.
translations.nl: We bespreken het menu voor vanavond.
translations.uk: Ми обговорюємо меню на сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hi: हम आज रात के मेनू पर चर्चा कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Dyskutujemy o menu na dziś wieczór.
translations.nb: Vi diskuterer menyen for i kveld.
translations.id: Kami sedang membahas menu untuk malam ini.
translations.da: Vi diskuterer menuen til i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜のメニューについて話し合っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; colloquial impersonal 'we/one' that takes 3rd person singular agreement.
Finite main verb; present indicative 3rd person singular agreeing with 'On'.
Preposition 'de' contracted with definite article 'le'; introduces the NP 'menu' as the complement of the verb (objet prépositionnel).
Common noun; head of the NP governed by 'du'.
Preposition; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating purpose/time frame.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies 'soir'.
Common noun; head of the NP complement of 'pour'.

sentences.target: Nous débattons des horaires de vacances.

translations.fr: Nous débattons des horaires de vacances.
translations.en: We are debating the vacation schedule.
translations.es: Estamos debatiendo el calendario de vacaciones.
translations.it: Stiamo discutendo il calendario delle ferie.
translations.yue: 我哋喺度討論休假安排。
translations.pt: Estamos discutindo o cronograma de férias.
translations.he: אנחנו דנים בלוח הזמנים של החופשות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang thảo luận về lịch nghỉ.
translations.hi: हम छुट्टियों की समय-सारिणी पर चर्चा कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 休暇のスケジュールについて話し合っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; first person plural, triggers 1PL agreement.
Finite main verb; present indicative 1st person plural agreeing with 'Nous'.
Preposition 'de' contracted with plural definite article 'les'; introduces the NP 'horaires' as a complement (objet prépositionnel).
Common noun, plural; head of the NP governed by 'des'.
Preposition; links 'horaires' to the complement 'vacances' (compound noun relation).
Common noun, plural (lexically plural); complement of 'de'.

sentences.target: Vous débattez du prénom du bébé.

translations.fr: Vous débattez du prénom du bébé.
translations.en: You’re debating the baby’s first name.
translations.es: Están debatiendo el nombre del bebé.
translations.de: Ihr diskutiert über den Namen des Babys.
translations.it: State discutendo il nome del bambino.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们在讨论宝宝的名字。
translations.pt: Vocês estão discutindo o nome do bebê.
translations.he: אתם מתלבטים על השם של התינוק.
translations.vi: Các bạn đang bàn về tên cho em bé.
translations.nl: Jullie bespreken de naam van de baby.
translations.hi: आप बच्चे के नाम पर चर्चा कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 赤ちゃんの名前について話し合っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; second person plural or formal singular.
Finite main verb; present indicative 2nd person plural agreeing with 'Vous'.
Preposition 'de' contracted with 'le'; introduces the NP 'prénom' as complement.
Common noun; head of the NP complement of 'du'.
Preposition 'de' contracted with 'le'; introduces the NP 'bébé' as a genitive-like complement ('prénom du bébé').
Common noun; head of the NP complement of 'du'.

sentences.target: J'aime débattre de films après la séance.
sentences.reading: /ʒɛm de.batʁ də film a.pʁɛ la se.ɑ̃s/

translations.fr: J'aime débattre de films après la séance.
translations.ipa: /ʒɛm de.batʁ də film a.pʁɛ la se.ɑ̃s/
translations.en: I like to debate movies after the screening.
translations.es: Me gusta debatir sobre películas después de la función.
translations.de: Ich diskutiere nach der Vorstellung gern über Filme.
translations.it: Mi piace discutere di film dopo la proiezione.
translations.ko: 상영 후에 영화에 대해 이야기하는 걸 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢在放映结束后讨论电影。
translations.yue: 我鍾意睇完戲之後傾下電影。
translations.ru: Мне нравится обсуждать фильмы после сеанса.
translations.pt: Gosto de conversar sobre filmes depois da sessão.
translations.he: אני אוהב לדבר על סרטים אחרי ההקרנה.
translations.tr: Gösterimden sonra filmler hakkında konuşmayı seviyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi thích bàn về phim sau buổi chiếu.
translations.nl: Ik praat graag over films na de voorstelling.
translations.uk: Мені подобається обговорювати фільми після сеансу.
translations.hu: Szeretek a vetítés után filmekről beszélgetni.
translations.hi: मुझे फिल्म देखने के बाद फिल्मों पर चर्चा करना पसंद है.
translations.pl: Lubię dyskutować o filmach po seansie.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να συζητάω για ταινίες μετά την προβολή.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å diskutere filmer etter visningen.
translations.id: Saya suka membahas film setelah pemutaran.
translations.sv: Jag gillar att diskutera filmer efter visningen.
translations.ro: Îmi place să discut despre filme după proiecție.
translations.cs: Rád po projekci diskutuji o filmech.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide at diskutere film efter visningen.
translations.ja: 上映後に映画について語り合うのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before a vowel-initial verb; 1st person singular.
Finite main verb; present indicative 1st person singular, taking an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'aime' (controlled by the subject 'J'').
Preposition selecting an NP after 'débattre' ('débattre de + N'); introduces 'films'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'de'.
Preposition; introduces a temporal PP ('après la séance').
Definite article; feminine singular determiner for 'séance'.
Common noun; head of the NP complement of 'après'.
